projects.name: Algorithmic Trading SaaS Platform
projects.description: Engineered full-stack algorithmic trading platform enabling white-label bot deployment with React.js frontend and Django backend. Integrated OpenAI API for intelligent trading signal generation and real-time market data processing. Technologies: React.js, Django, OpenAI API, WebSocket, MongoDB.

projects.name: NeoBank Digital Banking Platform
projects.description: Built comprehensive banking solution with Stripe Issuing/Identity, Plaid API, and Supabase. Implemented KYC/AML compliance, card management, and real-time transaction processing. Technologies: React.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe APIs, Supabase Auth.

projects.name: NeoBank Core Banking Backend
projects.description: Built microservices architecture with Node.js and PostgreSQL for KYC/AML compliance using Stripe Identity. Implemented transaction processing engine with ACID compliance and Plaid API integration for account aggregation. Technologies: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe APIs, Supabase, Redis, Docker.

projects.name: AI-Powered CRO Audit Dashboard
projects.description: Created website analysis tool with interactive heatmaps, user flow visualization, and performance metrics. Implemented responsive design scoring with actionable UI/UX recommendations.

projects.name: B2Lead - Lead Generation Platform
projects.description: Built automated lead generation SaaS using Next.js and MongoDB, reducing lead acquisition costs by \textbf{\$1,000+ monthly}. Developed web scraping algorithms and API integrations for high-conversion business lead compilation. Technologies: Next.js, MongoDB, Node.js, Express.js.

projects.name: Gethub - Git Version Control System
projects.description: Recreated core GitHub features from scratch using C++ including repository management, commit tracking, branching/merging, and diff algorithms.

projects.name: Content Creator Platform
projects.description: Created educational content on software engineering topics across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok, achieving \textbf{500,000+ total views}. Produced technical tutorials covering React.js and full-stack development concepts.
